# UI/UX Pro Max — Design Intelligence

Comprehensive design guide for web and mobile applications.

## When to Apply

- Designing new UI components or pages
- Choosing color palettes and typography
- Reviewing code for UX issues
- Building landing pages or dashboards
- Implementing accessibility requirements

## Design System Building Blocks

### Color Systems
- **Restrained**: tinted neutrals + one accent (≤10%). Default for products.
- **Committed**: one saturated color carries 30-60%. Brand-default.
- **Generous**: two saturated colors (≥15% each) + restrained neutrals.
- Use OKLCH color space. Never use pure `#000` or `#fff`.
- Ensure WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for large text).

### Typography
- Limit to 2 typefaces: one display (headings) + one body.
- Use a scale: 12/14/16/18/20/24/30/36/48/60/72.
- Line height: 1.1-1.2 for headings, 1.5-1.6 for body text.
- Max line length: 60-75 characters for readability.

### Spacing
- Use a consistent scale: 4/8/12/16/20/24/32/40/48/64/80.
- Apply 8px grid for layout, 4px grid for fine-tuning.

## UX Guidelines

- Every action needs feedback (visual, not just functional).
- Errors should be clear, specific, and actionable.
- Reduce cognitive load — show only what's needed at each step.
- Mobile-first for responsive, desktop-first for complex tools.
- Test with real users on real devices.
